Text: Hello in custom eldritch UI
This line uses vanilla UI
Back to eldritch
I sense madness in you, seeker.
Bring me 3 cod (one-time, +500$).
You have already brought what I asked.
Place 3 cod on the grid, then click Done.
Excellent. The madness flows into the world.
You have not brought what I asked.
Craft me an Insanity Cell (one-time, needs 3 scrap).
I have already forged your cell.
Place 3 scrap on the grid, then click Done.
The cell is forged. Bring me aberrations to charge it.
You lack the materials.
Charge my cell (each aberration = +10 charge).
You have no cell to charge. Forge one first.
The cell is already full.
Place aberrations on the grid, then click Done.
The aberrations pour into the cell.
You brought no aberration.
Not now.
As you wish.
